obfuscationNote: 29/30 class samples are hashed (e.g., x9f619, xh8yej3). Zero data-testid. CSS selectors unusable. Rely on aria-label, role, text matching.
selectorStrategy: aria-label > role > text-match > structural. CSS classes score 0.

regions.label: Top Navigation Bar
regions.description: Full-width top bar with logo, search, page tabs, and account controls

regions.label: Account Controls and Settings
regions.description: Top-right buttons: Menu (apps grid), Messenger, Notifications, Profile

regions.label: Left Sidebar Navigation
regions.description: Profile link, main nav (Friends, Memories, Saved, Groups, Reels, Marketplace, Feeds), See more, Shortcuts. Only visible at viewport width > ~1200px.

regions.label: Create a Post
regions.description: Post composer with prompt text, live video, photo/video, and feeling/activity buttons

regions.label: Stories Tray
regions.description: Horizontal scrollable story carousel with create story and user stories

regions.label: News Feed
regions.description: Central column of post cards. No role=feed detected. Posts found by 'Actions for this post' button. Each post has: author link, timestamp, content, actions menu, reactions toolbar, Like/Comment buttons.

regions.label: Contacts Sidebar
regions.description: Right sidebar with online contacts list, search, and new message button

views.description: News feed with stories, create post, left nav, contacts sidebar
